name: bahama
description: Bahama is the agent-first cloud platform that gives Codex the power to seamlessly build, test, provision, and deploy real apps to the web.

interface.shortDescription: Seamlessly build, test, provision, and deploy real apps.
interface.longDescription: Bahama is the agent-first cloud platform that gives Codex the power to seamlessly build, test, provision, and deploy real apps to the web.
defaultPrompt: Help me build and deploy a web app using Bahama. I want to create an app that [describe]. Create a new project in Bahama, setup the project, write the code, and deploy it to the web.
